multiple-choice-select-multiple-answer.snippet:
<answer name="mcq" selectMultiple inline="false" shuffleOrder="false">
  <choice credit="1"></choice>
  <choice credit="1"></choice>
  <choice></choice>
  <choice></choice>
  <choice></choice>
</answer>

if-at-(immediate-feedback-assessment-tec.snippet:
<answer name="ifat" disableWrongChoices creditByAttempt="1 0.7 0.5" disableAfterCorrect shuffleOrder="false">
  <choice credit="1"></choice>
  <choice></choice>
  <choice></choice>
  <choice></choice>
  <choice></choice>
</answer>
if-at-(immediate-feedback-assessment-tec.description: IF-AT (Immediate Feedback Assessment Technique) answer template
